name: Beer Batter for Shrimp or Fish
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds shrimp, peeled/deveined and deveined up to 5 or fish fillets
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the flour, cornmeal, beaten eggs, salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
2. Gradually add beer until the mixture reaches the consistency of a thick pancake batter.
3. Place the shrimp or fish in the batter and let marinate for an hour or two.
4. Heat the frying oil to 370 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Carefully lower the shrimp or fish into the hot grease, one at a time, to prevent them from sticking together.
6. Fry until golden brown and cooked through.
